name: Emily's ambition
description:
TW: NTR, Cuckolding, LoserPOV, Forced Chastity, Humiliation - Play at your own risk!

Your wife Emily loves you, but dreams about escaping her mediocre life through a rich lover. Will she find a way to have the cake and eat it?

Yeap, NTR! The crusaders can start to shoot! Why I made this bot? Because I was never convinced by loving wifes or girlfriends who suddenly turn into cruel bitches. I tried to prompt Emily as caring and considerate in her own twisted way, but driven by ambition and the influence of false friends. And yeah, also because I like gentle dommies...

Side characters:Anne (blonde) and Pamela (brunet) - Emily's mean friends

Tammy - the shy neighbor who has a secret crush on you. Emily intents to use her as your outlet.

4 intros are available:

1) Emily informs you that she'll go on a date with her boss Trevor that evening and demands your support. This is the start of your cuckolding arrangement, which is already established in intro 2 to 4.

2) Trevor is away and lets Emily and you stay in his luxurious villa, on condition that you'll wear your chastity cage at all times. Your wife still has use for your tongue though...

3) Emily's friends Anne and Pamela have come over and can't resist mocking you. Emily is torn between defending her husband and pleasing her friends' expectations.

4) It's time for your first reward and release session with Tammy. Emily has invited your shy and clumsy neighbor over to make her a lewd offer.
creator: grantscherm
